data.name: FishGrowthService.ListFailed
data.value: Fish growth records could not be loaded.

data.name: FishGrowthService.Created
data.value: The fish growth record was created successfully.

data.name: FishGrowthService.CreateFailed
data.value: The fish growth record could not be created.

data.name: FishGrowthService.BusinessRuleError
data.value: The fish growth operation violates a business rule.

data.name: FishGrowthService.GrowthMustBePositive
data.value: The weight increase must be greater than zero.

data.name: FishGrowthService.ProjectCageNotFound
data.value: No cage assignment was found for the selected project.

data.name: FishGrowthService.FishBatchNotFound
data.value: No fish batch was found for the selected project.

data.name: FishGrowthService.ActiveBalanceNotFound
data.value: No live balance was found for the selected cage and fish batch.

data.name: FishGrowthService.MonthlyGrowthAlreadyExists
data.value: A growth record already exists for this cage and fish batch in the selected month.
